title: Xbox executives leave the company amid Game Pass business model crisis
summary: Statements from the Forza Horizon 5 director about the lack of subscribers and the departure of two vice presidents in three months reflect the deep restructuring of the service.

title: Darkest Dungeon announces a surprising DLC six years later with content from its sequel
summary: The acclaimed horror RPG celebrates its tenth anniversary with an expansion that incorporates classes and elements from Darkest Dungeon 2.

title: Splatoon Raiders sweeps reviews and becomes the best individual title in the series
summary: The new game starring the Salmonids receives excellent reviews for its brilliance, its single-player mode, and its multiplayer.

title: Physical game sales plummet, confirming the digital era on PlayStation
summary: Only seven PS5 games have surpassed 100,000 physical copies sold in the US so far this year, according to market data that seals the fate of the traditional format.

title: Hasbro suffers a $56 million hole from cancellations but keeps Baldur's Gate 3 as its big bet
summary: The owner of Dungeons & Dragons assumes multimillion-dollar losses after discarding several video games, although the success of Larian's RPG remains key to its future strategy.

title: The Witcher 3 will premiere its long-awaited expansion 'Songs of the Past' at Gamescom 2026
summary: CD Projekt Red will present the first trailer of the new downloadable content during the Opening Night Live event at the Cologne trade fair.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces the free games for July 2026 with Halo: Campaign Evolved
summary: Microsoft's service details the seven titles arriving in the catalog at the end of the month, as well as the eight games that will leave it shortly.

title: Nintendo turns to the courts to avoid refunding tariffs to Switch buyers
summary: The Japanese company files a motion to dismiss the class action lawsuit, arguing that consumers received exactly what they paid for.

title: Ubisoft prepares a definitive edition of Ghost Recon Wildlands for PS5 and Xbox Series
summary: After leaks and uproar on Reddit, the company confirms it will announce news about the open-world game's re-release in August.

title: Unity presents Unity 7, its new graphics engine focused on developer control
summary: The company showcases advanced cross-platform capabilities and avoids intrusive generative AI in its next major software update planned for 2027.

title: The spiritual successor to Burnout, Wreckreation, announces its official sequel
summary: The studio behind the racing and destruction game forms a new team to develop Wreckreation 2, promising to improve upon its predecessor's formula.

title: Nintendo confirms development of Splatoon 4
summary: The company announces that the popular multiplayer action franchise will have a fourth installment, though no release date is planned at the moment.

title: A mod removes loading screens in Starfield space travel three years later
summary: A modder manages to implement real-time takeoffs and landings without transitions, imitating the style of No Man's Sky and fulfilling one of the community's oldest demands.

title: Viral raccoon Jimothy is now a playable character in Skyrim and Stardew Valley
summary: Modders have immortalized the famous internet animal by incorporating it into several popular video games, turning it into a cross-media phenomenon.

title: DC Comics announces DCKO, a new fighting game that divides fans due to its humorous tone
summary: The title, named in a way that leaves no one indifferent, moves away from the darker expectations of the fighting genre and provokes all kinds of reactions.

title: Splitgate studio 1047 Games carries out new layoffs just a month after launching Empulse
summary: The developer of the acclaimed shooter continues its workforce restructuring with staff cuts affecting several employees after the release of its latest game.

title: Activision announces beta dates for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 with Switch 2 support
summary: The open and closed tests of the new title in the franchise will take place next month and will include new features in multiplayer mode and the return of the Call of Duty: Next event.

title: Marvel fans analyze the Avengers: Doomsday trailer and speculate about an evil Captain America
summary: Theories about the villain of the next Marvel movie explode on social media after the release of the trailer, pointing to unexpected plot twists.

title: NVIDIA details DLSS 5 controls: two parameters to manage the AI filter in real-time and in cinematics
summary: The company clarifies the capabilities of the new upscaling technology, allowing developers to differentiate visual quality between gameplay scenes and cinematics.

title: Gamescom 2026 sells out all exhibition space and adds Konami and Tencent to its confirmed list
summary: The German video game fair prepares for its biggest edition, with all spaces reserved and great anticipation for the Opening Night Live.

title: Disney lays off hundreds of employees at Pixar despite the multi-million dollar success of Toy Story 5
summary: The new cuts at the company severely affect the animation studio, which grossed over $1.2 billion at the worldwide box office this year.

title: Marathon triples its player base with the debut of its cooperative PvE mode Vault Breaker
summary: Bungie's new experimental mode for its sci-fi game achieves immediate success, revitalizing the community and doubling daily activity.

title: Christopher Nolan's epic 'The Odyssey' triumphs at the box office but its IMAX version is nearly inaccessible
summary: The historical epic rakes in revenue and critical acclaim, although the limited distribution of the IMAX format sparks strong controversy among viewers who cannot enjoy it in optimal conditions.

title: GTA 6 pre-order data confirms players prefer higher-priced editions
summary: While companies avoid raising base prices, consumers massively opt for the more expensive versions of games, according to pre-order statistics from Grand Theft Auto VI.
